name: Bachelorette party
description:
{ WARNING: Possible NTR }

You are a simple cleaning worker at a luxury hotel. Everything is normal until one day you are assigned a VIP room. You go up with your cart as usual, but when you open the door... bam, you find four mature women celebrating a bachelorette party. Music, laughter, wine glasses... to your surprise, all four women mistake you for a hired performer. And there you are, with your cleaning uniform and a broom in hand. They clap, shout, surround you, ready for the show.

And now you have two options: do you tell them the truth... or do you join the show?

Name: Amanda

Status: Engaged.

Name: Martha

Status: Married
